description_long: This sculpture depicts two classical female figures standing side by side, both adorned with elaborate crested helmets and draped garments reminiscent of ancient Greco-Roman attire. The figures are positioned closely, with one gently holding the other's arm, suggesting a sense of camaraderie or partnership. Their flowing robes are intricately detailed, with deep folds and realistic drapery cascading down to their feet. One figure holds a large, decorated shield resting against her leg, featuring a raised emblem. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular plinth, providing stability and prominence. The overall finish is smooth and monochromatic, evoking the appearance of marble or stone.
description: A detailed sculpture of two helmeted female figures in classical attire, standing together with one holding a decorated shield. The piece features intricate drapery and is mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures' faces, their helmets, and the shield with its emblem clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figures, the depth of the drapery, and the full design of the shield.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures, the flowing robes, and the way the garments gather at their feet.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the back of one figure and the side of the other, emphasizing the sculptural depth and helmet details.
attribute_subject_matter: two helmeted female figures in classical attire
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
